name: Mashed Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed potatoes, sifted flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Mix together the eggs and milk and stir lightly into the potato-flour mixture. Add corn syrup and nutmeg and beat well.
3. Grease a griddle or large skillet.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto the hot griddle, forming small pancakes.
5. Cook until brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
